parameters.query: SELECT *, date_added::text AS date_added, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM outreach_leads ORDER BY created_at ASC

UPDATE outreach_leads SET status = 'Replied', reply_category = '{{ ($json.classification || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', notes = 'Auto-reconciled from Saleshandy', updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = '{{ ($json.email || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' RETURNING id
SELECT *, date_added::text AS date_added, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM outreach_leads ORDER BY created_at ASC
